print_ping.description: Prints a ping message for the user. Usage: print_ping <name>. This is designed to be used with schedule_task as a one-shot notification.

delayed_ping.description: Delays for specified seconds, then prints a ping. One-shot (non-recurring). Usage: delayed_ping <name> <seconds>

send_email.description: Sends an email via SMTP. Automatically prepends the Panda AI Assistant signature. Usage: send_email <to_email> <subject> <body>

check_emails.description: Checks the IMAP server inbox for new unread email messages or replies, prints details, and marks them as read. Usage: check_emails

open_youtube_search.description: Opens YouTube search for a given query in the default browser. Usage: open_youtube_search <search_query>
